style_a.name: 港片复古胶片
style_a.prompt_suffix: Wong Kar-wai style, high contrast, heavy film grain, red and green neon glow, warm yellow tones, anamorphic lens, claustrophobic framing, Hong Kong retro 1990s aesthetic

style_b.name: 茶山奇幻古风
style_b.prompt_suffix: lush green tea mountain, ethereal mist, golden sunrise, traditional Chinese fantasy, flowing hanfu robes, vibrant saturated colors, epic aerial landscape, dreamy oriental mythology

music_sync.lyrics: [前奏] → [Spoken] '生活中，我是一个平凡的人。但在这里，我将成为一段传奇！'

atmosphere.overall_mood: 深夜港风出租屋的压抑孤独，CRT绿光与窗外红绿霓虹交映，念白时眼神坚定，按Enter瞬间屏幕爆发强光
atmosphere.lighting: CRT屏幕绿光为主光源，窗外红绿霓虹灯映射到墙面和面部

video_prompt: A lonely man in vintage suit in a cramped Hong Kong apartment at night, CRT monitor glowing green code, neon signs outside window, he dramatically presses Enter and the screen explodes with blinding light, Wong Kar-wai cinematic style, heavy film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio, 15 seconds.

bgm.description: 低沉压抑的前奏，环境音渐入，钢琴或电子合成器单音
bgm.instruments: 环境采样、钢琴单音、低频合成器
bgm.dynamics: 渐强 → 念白时突停 → Enter后爆发

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 黑屏渐亮——老旧CRT显示器特写，屏幕上绿色代码自上而下滚动，屏幕微微闪烁
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 绿色CRT光芒在黑暗中亮起，复古未来感
storyboard_9grid.sfx: CRT显示器嗡鸣声、代码滚动的噼噼声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a vintage CRT monitor in a dark room, green terminal code scrolling on the black screen, the monitor slightly flickering, old yellowed plastic casing, eerie green glow illuminating the darkness, Wong Kar-wai style, heavy film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 镜头缓缓后拉——揭示CRT旁边的半杯冷茶、满溢的烟灰缸、散落的草稿纸，一只手无力地搭在键盘上

characters.name: 创作者A
characters.action: 手无力搭在键盘上，仅见手和前臂

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 杂乱的桌面细节展示港风生活痕迹
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 烟灰缸轻碰声、远处街头隐约人声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A cluttered desk revealed as camera pulls back from a CRT monitor, half cup of cold tea, overflowing ashtray with cigarette butts, scattered draft papers, a weary hand resting on a retro mechanical keyboard, red and green neon light spilling through window, Hong Kong apartment, Wong Kar-wai style, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 中景——主角穿宽大旧西装，疲惫地靠在椅背上，窗外霓虹灯'茶餐厅'招牌红绿交替闪烁映在他脸上

characters.name: 创作者A
characters.action: 靠在椅背上，面朝窗外方向

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 霓虹灯红绿交替打在面部，王家卫式光影
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A tired young man in an oversized vintage dark suit sitting slumped in a chair, red and green neon light from a tea restaurant sign outside flickering across his face alternately, cramped Hong Kong apartment, Wong Kar-wai cinematic lighting, high contrast, heavy film grain, anamorphic bokeh, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角缓缓转头面向CRT屏幕，眼神从迷茫中露出一丝光——念白'我是一个平凡的人'
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: CRT绿光开始照亮面部，取代部分霓虹红绿
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a young man slowly turning to face a CRT monitor, green screen light illuminating his face, expression shifting from lost to contemplative, dark Hong Kong apartment background, Wong Kar-wai intimate portrait style, film grain, warm yellow and green mixed lighting, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 特写——主角眼眸，CRT绿色代码在瞳孔中倒映流动，眼神逐渐变得坚定
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 代码在瞳孔中映射——人与机器的连接
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Extreme close-up of intense eyes with green code reflecting in the pupils, the gaze shifting from emptiness to fierce determination, green CRT light on the iris, dark room tones, Wong Kar-wai macro portrait, heavy film grain, cinematic, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 中景——主角坐直身体，双手回到键盘上，肩膀从下沉变为挺拔

characters.name: 创作者A
characters.action: 坐直身体，双手归位到键盘上

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 气氛从压抑转为蓄力——要来了
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A young man in vintage suit straightening up at his desk, hands positioned on a mechanical keyboard ready to type, shoulders rising from slumped to upright, newfound determination, CRT green glow and neon light, Hong Kong apartment, wong Kar-wai style, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 特写——指尖悬在Enter键上方，画面微微颤动，空气中仿佛能感到压力
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 一切凝固——最后一刻的静默蓄力
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 心跳声加速、低频压力音
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Extreme close-up of a finger hovering above an Enter key on a vintage mechanical keyboard, tension visible in the slightly trembling hand, shallow depth of field, dramatic anticipation, the key illuminated by green CRT light, Wong Kar-wai suspense moment, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 猛按Enter！——指尖重重击下，键盘发出清脆声响，CRT屏幕瞬间亮度暴增
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 巨大的机械键盘按键声 + 电流冲击声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A finger slamming down on an Enter key with force, mechanical keyboard click moment, CRT monitor behind suddenly flaring to maximum brightness, shockwave of green light expanding from the screen, decisive impact moment, Wong Kar-wai style action beat, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: CRT屏幕爆发出刺眼的白绿色强光，光芒吞没整个房间，主角的剪影在强光中融化消融

characters.name: 创作者A
characters.action: 被屏幕强光吞没，身体轮廓在白光中消融

transition.description: 强光过曝→过渡到下一段

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 一切被光芒吞没——旧世界的终结
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 刺耳的电子啸叫 + 玻璃碎裂声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A CRT monitor exploding with blinding white-green light that engulfs the entire Hong Kong apartment room, the silhouette of a man dissolving in the overwhelming light, room objects becoming overexposed, screen light overpowering all neon colors, cataclysmic digital awakening, Wong Kar-wai style dramatic flash, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio
